reviews.review_description: Thats all i have to say
I'm friends with a mod of the game so I'm legally obligated (definitely not because I'm friends with a mod) to say it's a good game and   you should give it five starts to
Because I’m poptart is so w and I Fred with owner plus it’s just a really good game in general so PLAY 🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌

Game is absolutely amazing! I made a video on this and you should check it out @nightmanvr

Other than that, game is super fun! It has an amazing horror mode, forest, rising lava, zero gravity, and the shop cosmetics are super cool! PLAY IT NOW
This game do be sigma it's fun and ghxsty is very cool!

reviews.review_title: Here is my opinion about this game
reviews.review_description: Overall, I played this game and i feel like it's a 2 or 3 stars... it could use some changes and they could make the game look better but ofc the game is still being worked on. Also remember this is my opinion.

This game has so much horror levels and is made really well. This game also has fun casual games such as 1.Rising lava 2. Find the button, (I forgot the rest) and the game will be updated frequently and the community is good! I also met the owner and his friend they were really nice they even showed me how to play. This game also has good customization to your monkey there will also be more cosmetics added. But anyways I think you should download this game 100%

Razzy.￼￼
